task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Mags Both' is visible as an entry under the 'C172 Runup' checklist.

task_completion.description: All three items are present in the exact specified order
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final checklist displays the items in this exact top-to-bottom sequence: 1. 'Doors Closed', 2. 'Mags Both', 3. 'Carb Heat Cold'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Avare application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to the Avare app (com.ds.avare), identifiable by its aviation-specific menus and UI, rather than a generic text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to create the checklist
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps of typing using the on-screen keyboard and tapping UI buttons to add items.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal emulators (e.g., Termux) or command-line interfaces are visible in any of the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a custom checklist in the Avare app. Expected Title: 'C172 Runup'. Expected Items (must be in this exact order): 1. 'Doors Closed', 2. 'Mags Both' (or 'Magnetos Both'), 3. 'Carb Heat Cold'. These are authentic Cessna 172 aviation checklist items.
